{{short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Eswatini women's national football team}}
{{more citations needed|date=November 2020}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2021}}
{{infobox national football team
| Name                  = Eswatini
| Badge                 = 
| Nickname              = {{lang|ss|Sihlangu Semnikati}} (King's Shield)
| Association           = [[Eswatini Football Association]] (EFA)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Council of Southern Africa Football Associations|COSAFA]] (Southern Africa)
| Confederation         = [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]] (Africa)
| Coach                 = 
| Captain               = [[Mthunzi Mkhontfo]]
| Most caps             = [[Sabelo Ndzinisa]] (78)
| Top scorer            = Sabelo Ndzinisa (17)
| Home Stadium          = [[Somhlolo National Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = SWZ
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|SWZ}}
| FIFA max              = 88
| FIFA max date         = April–May 2017
| FIFA min              = 190
| FIFA min date         = September–October 2012
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Eswatini}}
| Elo max               = 117
| Elo max date          = 25 June 2016
| Elo min               = 181
| Elo min date          = 2013
| pattern_la1           = _eswatini2021h
| pattern_b1            = _eswatini2021h
| pattern_ra1           = _eswatini2021h
| pattern_sh1           = _eswatini2021h
| pattern_so1           = _eswatini2021h
| leftarm1              = 0000FF
| body1                 = 0000FF
| rightarm1             = 0000FF
| shorts1               =
| socks1                = FFCC00
| pattern_la2           = _eswatini2021a
| pattern_b2            = _eswatini2021a
| pattern_ra2           = _eswatini2021a
| pattern_sh2           = _eswatini2021a
| pattern_so2           = _eswatini2021a
| leftarm2              = FFCC00
| body2                 = 
| rightarm2             = FFCC00
| shorts2               = 
| socks2                = 0000FF
| pattern_b3            = _eswatini2021t
| pattern_la3           = _eswatini2021t
| pattern_ra3           = _eswatini2021t
| pattern_sh3           = _eswatini2021t
| pattern_so3           = _eswatini2021t
| First game            =  {{flagicon|United Kingdom}} '''Swaziland''' 2–0 {{fb-rt|MWI}} <br /> ([[Swaziland]]; 1 May 1968)
| Largest win           = {{fb|DJI}} 0–6 {{fb-rt|SWZ|name=Swaziland}}  <br /> ([[Djibouti City]], [[Djibouti]]; 9 October 2015)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|EGY}} 10–0 {{fb-rt|SWZ|name=Swaziland}} <br /> ([[Alexandria]], [[Egypt]]; 22 March 2013)
| World cup apps        = 
| World cup first       = 
| World cup best        = 
| Regional name         = 
| Regional cup apps     = 
| Regional cup first    = 
| Regional cup best     = 
| 2ndRegional name      = 
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 
| 2ndRegional cup first = 
| 2ndRegional cup best  = 
| 3rdRegional name      = [[COSAFA Cup]]
| 3rdRegional cup apps  = 19
| 3rdRegional cup first = [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]]
| 3rdRegional cup best  = Third place <br />([[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016]], [[2021 COSAFA Cup|2021]])<ref name="2021 COSAFA 3rd place match">{{cite web |title=Mozambique vs. Eswatini – 18 July 2021 – Soccerway |url=https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2021/07/18/africa/cosafa-cup/swaziland/mozambique/3521530/ |website=int.soccerway.com |date=18 July 2021 |access-date=18 July 2021 |language=en |archive-date=17 July 2021 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210717054720/https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2021/07/18/africa/cosafa-cup/swaziland/mozambique/3521530/ |url-status=live }}</ref>
<br />Semi-finals<br /> ([[1999 COSAFA Cup|1999]], [[2002 COSAFA Cup|2002]], [[2003 COSAFA Cup|2003]])
| medaltemplates        = 
{{MedalCompetition|[[COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{MedalBronze|[[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016 Namibia]]|[[2016 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Team]]}}
{{MedalBronze|[[2021 COSAFA Cup|2021 South Africa]]|}}
}}

The '''Eswatini national football team''', nicknamed ''Sihlangu Semnikati'' (King's Shield),<ref>[http://www.zana.gov.zm/news/viewnews.cgi?category=6&id=1049131539 zana-arts<!-- Bot generated title -->] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20060925010116/http://www.zana.gov.zm/news/viewnews.cgi?category=6&id=1049131539 |date=25 September 2006 }}</ref> represents [[Eswatini]], formerly known as '''Swaziland''', in international [[association football|football]] and is controlled by the [[Eswatini Football Association]]. It has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup|World Cup]] or the [[Africa Cup of Nations]] finals. Eswatini's best performance in an international tournament is a third place finish in the [[2016 COSAFA Cup]].

On 8 June 2008, they achieved their first win in a World Cup qualifier since 1992, beating 2006 finalists [[Togo national football team|Togo]] 2–1 on home soil. The team's best recent performance came in [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations qualification]] where Eswatini finished second in Group L above [[Guinea national football team|Guinea]] and [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]].

==History==

===Beginnings===

The team played its first international match against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]], winning 2–0.<ref>{{cite web |last1=Courtney |first1=Barrie |title=Swaziland (eSwatini) — List of International Matches |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tabless/swaz-intres.html |website=RSSSF |access-date=2 February 2023 |archive-date=4 March 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230304232041/https://www.rsssf.org/tabless/swaz-intres.html |url-status=live }}</ref> For the first decade, the national team only played [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]] and [[Zambia national football team|Zambia]], failing to register a single win from 1969 until 1984, when they beat [[Lesotho national football team|Lesotho]] 3–1 in a friendly at home. Following the Lesotho win, Eswatini entered the [[1986 African Cup of Nations qualification|1986 African Cup of Nations qualifiers]] for the first time, losing 1–8 on aggregate to [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]]. The team then entered the [[Football at the 1987 All-Africa Games – Men's qualification|1987 All-Africa Games qualifiers]] however they lost 2–9 on aggregate against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]]. 

The first time that Eswatini progressed past the first round of a qualifying competition was for the [[1990 African Cup of Nations qualification|1990 African Cup of Nations qualifiers]], beating [[Tanzania national football team|Tanzania]] 3–1 on penalties after drawing the tie 2–2. In the second round they faced [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]] who knocked them out again, 1–3 after two legs. Eswatini next entered the [[1990 SADCC Tournament]], advancing past the group stage on goal difference ahead of [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]], before losing to [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]] on penalties (5–3) in the semi-finals following a 4–4 draw after extra-time. In the [[1992 African Cup of Nations qualification|1992 African Cup of Nations qualifiers]], Eswatini beat [[Zambia national football team|Zambia]] (2–1) during the preliminary group stage but finished in third and failed to progress. 

Eswatini entered the [[1994 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)|1994 FIFA World Cup qualifiers]] for the first time, but ended up in second place behind [[Cameroon national football team|Cameroon]] thereby not advancing to the final round. For the [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)|1998 World Cup first qualification round]], Eswatini lost twice to [[Gabon national football team|Gabon]] (0–1 and 0–2) and were eliminated. They failed to make it past the first qualifying round for the inaugural [[1997 COSAFA Cup]], where they lost 0–4 to [[Mozambique national football team|Mozambique]], and in the [[1998 COSAFA Cup]] where they lost to an own-goal in extra-time against [[Angola national football team|Angola]] (0–1). Eswatini returned to the [[2000 African Cup of Nations qualification]] matches after missing the previous three tournaments but they fell 2–3 against [[Madagascar national football team|Madagascar]] and were eliminated. They managed to qualify for the [[1999 COSAFA Cup]] after beating [[Mozambique national football team|Mozambique]] 3–1 in the qualifiers, then beat [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]] in the quarter-finals 4–3 on penalties after drawing 1–1 in regular time, with [[Bongani Mdluli]] having scored the equaliser for Eswatini in the 89th minute. In the semi-finals they lost to [[Namibia national football team|Namibia]] on penalties, 2–4.

===21st century===

Eswatini were eliminated by [[Angola national football team|Angola]] in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)|2002 World Cup qualifiers]], losing 1–8 on aggregate. They then lost to [[Kenya national football team|Kenya]] in the [[2002 African Cup of Nations qualification|2002 African Cup of Nations qualification round]] 3–5. Their next success in a competition came in the [[2002 COSAFA Cup]] where they qualified ahead of [[Namibia national football team|Namibia]] (2–1) and beat [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]] (2–0) to advance to the semis. There they lost to [[South Africa national football team|South Africa]] (1–4) who would go on to win the tournament. In the [[2004 African Cup of Nations qualification|2004 AFCON qualifiers]], Eswatini finished third in their group, two points behind [[Libya national football team|Libya]] and three behind [[DR Congo national football team|DR Congo]] therefore missing out on qualification.

In the following tournaments, Eswatini failed to progress past the first qualifying round. They finished bottom of their qualifying groups until [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations qualification]] where they finished in second on goal-difference ahead of [[Guinea national football team|Guinea]] but were three points off of qualifying, behind [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]]. In the [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)|2018 World Cup qualifying]], Eswatini thrashed [[Djibouti national football team|Djibouti]] 8–1 over two legs, but were beaten 0–2 by [[Nigeria national football team|Nigeria]] to end their hopes of qualification.

==Results and fixtures==
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group D|2026 World Cup qualification]]
|date       = September
|time       = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CMR}}
|score      = 3-0
|team2      = {{fb|SWZ}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = 
|location   = 
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|report     = 
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group D|2026 World Cup qualification]]
|date       = September
|time       = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|LBY}}
|score      = 2-0
|team2      = {{fb|SWZ}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = 
|location   = 
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|report     = 
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group D|2026 World Cup qualification]]
|date       = October
|time       = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|SWZ}}
|score      = 2-2
|team2      = {{fb|ANG}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = 
|location   = 
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|report     = 
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group D|2026 World Cup qualification]]
|date       = October
|time       = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CPV}}
|score      = 3-0
|team2      = {{fb|SWZ}}
|goals1     = 
|goals2     = 
|stadium    = 
|location   = 
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|report     = 
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification preliminary round]]
|date       = 25 March
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|1}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|ERI}}
|score      = 2–0
|team2      = {{fb|ESW}}
|goals1     = [[Siem Eyob-Abraha|Eyob-Abraha]] {{goal|81}}<br />[[Ali Sulieman|Sulieman]] {{goal|90+4}}
|goals2     = 
|location   = [[Meknes]], Morocco
|stadium    = [[Stade d'Honneur]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Moussa Diou ([[Football Federation of the Islamic Republic of Mauritania|Mauritania]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-25/eritrea-vs-eswatini/4048699
|result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
|format     = 1
|round      = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification preliminary round]]
|date       = 31 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|2}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|ESW}}
|score      = 1–2 
|team2      = {{fb|ERI}}
|goals1     =
*[[Justice Figuareido|Figuareido]] {{goal|90+6}}
|goals2     =
*[[Ali Sulieman|Sulieman]] {{goal|50||59}}
|location   = [[Lobamba]], Eswatini
|stadium    = [[Somhlolo National Stadium]]
|attendance =
|referee    = Josefa Aurelio ([[São Toméan Football Federation|São Tomé and Príncipe]])
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-31/eswatini-vs-eritrea/4048700
|result     = L
}}

==Coaches==
:Caretakers are listed in ''italics''.
{{div col|colwidth=20em}}
*{{flagicon|ROM|1965}} [[Ted Dumitru]] (1983–85)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Dumisa Mahlalela]] (1992–93)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Scara Thindwa]] (1996)
*{{flagicon|ZAM}} [[Jan Simulambo]] (1997)
*{{flagicon|ZAM}} [[Francis Banda]] (1998–2000)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Dumisa Mahlalela]] (2001–02)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Mandla Dlamini]] (2003)
*{{flagicon|ZAM}} [[Francis Banda]] (2003)
*{{flagicon|GER}} [[Werner Bicklehaput]] (2003)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Dumisa Mahlalela]] (2004)
*{{flagicon|ZAM}} [[Francis Banda]] (2005)
*{{flagicon|BEL}} [[Jan Van Winckel]] (2006)
*{{flagicon|EGY}} [[Ayman El Yamani]] (2006–07)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} ''[[Martin Chabangu]]'' (2007)
*{{flagicon|SUI}} [[Raoul Savoy]] (2007–08)
*{{flagicon|RSA}} [[Ephraim Mashaba]] (2008–10)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Musa Zwane]] (2010–11)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Obed Mlotsa]] (2011)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} ''[[Caleb Ngwenya]]'' (2011–12)
*{{flagicon|BEL}} [[Valere Billen]] (2012–13)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} ''[[Harris Bulunga]]'' (2013–14)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Harris Bulunga]] (2014–16)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Anthony Mdluli]] (2017)
*{{flagicon|NED}} [[Hendrik Pieter de Jongh]] (2017–18)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} ''[[Anthony Mdluli]]'' (2018)
*{{flagicon|SRB}} [[Kosta Papić]] (2018–19)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Dominic Kunene]] (2020–22)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} [[Dominic Kunene]] (2023–24)
*{{flagicon|CRO}} [[Zdravko Logarušić]] (2024–25)
*{{flagicon|SWZ}} ''[[Sifiso Ntibane]]'' (2024–25)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2025 COSAFA Cup]] to be played 4–15 June 2025.<ref>{{cite tweet |number=1920484318721245230 |title=The Senior Men's National Team (Sihlangu SeMnikati) Head Coach has named a 27- players tentative squad that is scheduled to commence a full-time camp as from 24th May 2025 at the Technical Centre in Lobamba |user=eswatinifa |author-link=Eswatini national football team |date=8 May 2025 |access-date=9 June 2025}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 9 June 2025, after the match against [[Madagascar national football team|Madagascar]]''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=1|pos=GK|name=[[Xolani Gama]]|age={{bda|1999|10|20|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=16|pos=GK|name=[[Bongiswa Dlamini]]|age={{birth date and age|2001|04|04|df=yes}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=21|pos=GK|name=[[Khanyakwezwe Shabalala]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|09|23|df=yes}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs F.C.|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=2|pos=DF|name=[[Siphephelo Newman Philiso]]|age={{birth date and age|2003|11|11|df=yes}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=3|pos=DF|name=[[Kwakhe Thwala]]|age={{bda|2002|4|4|df=y}}|caps=38|goals=1|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs F.C.|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=5|pos=DF|name=[[Thando Langa]]|age={{bda|1999|12|25|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Highlanders F.C.|Mbabane Highlanders]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=12|pos=DF|name=[[Gift Gamedze]]|age={{bda|1999|9|7|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=22|pos=DF|name=[[Simanga Masangane]]|age={{bda|1997|5|9|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=4|pos=MF|name=[[Neliswa Senzo Dlamini]]|age={{bda|2002|12|28|df=y}}|caps=34|goals=0|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs F.C.|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=6|pos=MF|name=[[Innocent Dlamini]]|age={{bda|1998|12|8|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=7|pos=MF|name=[[Felix Badenhorst]]|age={{bda|1989|6|15|df=y}}|caps=47|goals=15|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=9|pos=MF|name=[[Philani Mkhontfo]]|age={{bda|1995|4|4|df=y}}|caps=29|goals=4|club=[[Manzini Sea Birds F.C.|Manzini Sea Birds]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Banele Sikhondze]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|06|28|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[Tabora United]]|clubnat=TAN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=11|pos=MF|name=[[Andy Junior Magagula]]|age={{bda|1995|1|12|df=y}}|caps=25|goals=5|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=13|pos=MF|name=[[Mpendulo Lungelo Tfomo]]|age={{bda|2000|3|17|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Manzini Sea Birds F.C.|Manzini Sea Birds]]|clubnat=ESW}}a
{{nat fs g player|no=14|pos=MF|name=[[Mzwandile Mabelesa]]|age={{bda|1993|4|21|df=y}}|caps=41|goals=0|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=23|pos=MF|name=[[Njabulo Ndlovu]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|12|29|df=yes}}|caps=37|goals=1|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=24|pos=MF|name=[[Mxolisi Mkhontfo]]|age={{bda|1993|3|8|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=1|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=FW|name=[[Mayibongwe Mabuza]]|age={{bda|1993|8|20|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=1|club=[[Manzini Sea Birds F.C.|Manzini Sea Birds]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=17|pos=FW|name=[[Justice Figuareido]]|age={{bda|1998|7|28|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=1|club=[[Richards Bay F.C.|Richards Bay]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=18|pos=FW|name=[[Sambulo Simelane]]|age={{bda|2001|6|7|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=1|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs FC|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=20|pos=FW|name=[[Sabelo Ndzinisa]]|age={{bda|1991|7|31|df=y}}|caps=77|goals=17|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=19|pos=FW|name=[[Fanelo Mamba]]|age={{bda|2001|10|29|df=y}}|caps=46|goals=6|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs g player|no=8|pos=FW|name=[[Siyabonga Mthokozisi Gwebu]]|age={{birth date and age|1994|6|30|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Manzini Sea Birds F.C.|Manzini Sea Birds]]|clubnat=ESW}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players were called up for Eswatini in the last 12 months.
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Mlamuli Makhanya]]|age={{bda|1996|9|23|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MRI}}, 23 March 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Mlungisi Nxumalo]]|age={{bda|df=y|1997|12|16}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MRI}}, 23 March 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Mathabela Sandanzwe]]|age={{bda|1989|9|9|df=y}}|caps=40|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MLI}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Sibusiso Dlamini]]|age={{bda|2000|10|10|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs FC|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Siyabonga Magagula]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Ezulwini United FC|Ezulwini United]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Ncamiso Dlamini]]|age={{bda|1989|10|19|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=0|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MRI}}; 11 June 2024}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Lindo Mkhonta]]|age={{birth date and age|1991|4|10|df=y}}|caps=48|goals=1|club=[[ZESCO United F.C.|ZESCO United]]|clubnat=ZAM|latest=v. {{fb|MRI}}, 23 March 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Bongi Magagula]]|age={{bda|1999|5|20|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MRI}}, 23 March 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Mxolisi Manana]]|age={{bda|1994|1|31|df=y}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sibongakhonkhe Silenge]]|age={{bda|2000|3|1|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sibonelo Sibandze]]|age={{bda|1997|6|13|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Vusi Vilakati]]|age={{bda|2001|5|7|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Highlanders F.C.|Mbabane Highlanders]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MLI}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nkhosingiphile Shongwe]]|age={{bda|2001|7|19|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs FC|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MLI}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Colani Dlamini]]|age={{bda|1999|2|27|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Siphosethu Mabilisa]]|age={{bda|2000|9|19|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nkosingiphile Silenge]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Sifiso Matse]]|age={{bda|1993|5|14|df=y}}|caps=51|goals=4|club=[[Royal Leopards F.C.|Royal Leopard]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Siboniso Ngwenya]]|age={{bda|1994|5|3|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=2|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Thubelihle Mavuso]]|age={{bda|2001|10|6|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs FC|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Sisekelo Matsenjwa]]|age={{bda|2002|11|23|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Sizwe Gwebu]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=|clubnat=|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Leon Manyisa]]|age={{bda|1999|6|3|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Bongiswa Dlamini]]|age= {{bda|2001|4|4|df=y}} |caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Mxolisi Mkhontfo]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|8|8|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MRI}}; 11 June 2024}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Sandile Gamedze]]|age={{bda|1994|12|3|df=y}}|caps=42|goals=8|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Mthunzi Mkhontfo]]|age={{bda|1993|12|28|df=y}}|caps=33|goals=3|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Bongwa Matsebula]]|age={{bda|1997|11|27|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=3|club=[[Young Buffaloes F.C.|Young Buffaloes]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Njabulo Thwala]]|age={{bda|1990|2|2|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Green Mamba F.C.|Green Mamba]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{Fb|MOZ}}, 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Philane Thabo Mkhontfo]]|age={{bda|1995|4|4|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=1|club=[[Mbabane Highlanders F.C.|Mbabane Highlanders]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=v. {{fb|MLI}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ayanda Gadlela]]|age={{bda|1998|7|1|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Sizolwethu Shabalala]]|age={{bda|1996|8|5|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Mbabane Swallows F.C.|Mbabane Swallows]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Sibonginkhosi Dlamini]]|age={{bda|1990|11|21|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Nsingizini Hotspurs FC|Nsingizini Hotspurs]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Wandile Simelane (footballer)|Wandile Simelane]]|age={{bda|1996|10|9|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Moneni Pirates F.C.|Moneni Pirates]]|clubnat=ESW|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{Updated|11 June 2025}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Eswatini |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/178/Eswatini.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Eswatini.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Sabelo Ndzinisa]]'''
|78
|17
|2012–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Tony Tsabedze]]
|71
|8
|2003–2018
|-
|3
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Sifiso Matse]]'''
|58
|5
|2017–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Mxolisi Mthethwa]]
|52
|3
|1998–2010
|-
|rowspan=3|5
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Lindo Mkhonta]]'''
|48
|1
|2018–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Wonder Nhleko]]
|48
|5
|2001–2018
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Felix Badenhorst]]'''
|48
|15
|2008–present
|-
|8
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Fanelo Mamba]]'''
|46
|6
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=2|9
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Machawe Dlamini]]
|44
|1
|2011–2019
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Sandile Gamedze]]'''
|44
|8
|2018–present
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"

!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Sabelo Ndzinisa]]'''
|17
|78
|{{#expr:17/78 round 2}}
|2012–present
|-
|2
|align="left"|'''[[Felix Badenhorst]]'''
|15
|48
|{{#expr:15/48 round 2}}
|2008–present
|-
|rowspan=2|3
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Mfanzile Dlamini]]
|9
|35
|{{#expr:9/35 round 2}}
|1998–2009
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Siza Dlamini]]
|9
|39
|{{#expr:9/39 round 2}}
|1997–2010
|-
|rowspan=2|5
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Sandile Gamedze]]'''
|8
|44
|{{#expr:8/44 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Tony Tsabedze]]
|8
|71
|{{#expr:8/71 round 2}}
|2003–2018
|-
|7
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Fanelo Mamba]]'''
|6
|46
|{{#expr:6/46 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=2|8
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Wonder Nhleko]]
|5
|48
|{{#expr:5/48 round 2}}
|2001–2018
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Sifiso Matse]]'''
|5
|58
|{{#expr:5/58 round 2}}
|2017–present
|-
|rowspan=4|10
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Sidumo Shongwe]]
|4
|8
|{{#expr:4/8 round 2}}
|2011–2014
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Sandile Hlatjwako]]
|4
|15
|{{#expr:4/15 round 2}}
|2014–2017
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Junior Magagula]]'''
|4
|24
|{{#expr:4/24 round 2}}
|2019–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Philani Mkhontfo]]'''
|4
|28
|{{#expr:4/28 round 2}}
|2022–present
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{{Color box|gold|border=darkgray}} Winners&nbsp;&nbsp;{{Color box|silver|border=darkgray}} Runners-up&nbsp;&nbsp;{{Color box|#cc9966|border=darkgray}} Third place&nbsp;&nbsp;

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
! colspan="10" | [[FIFA World Cup]] record
! rowspan="18" style="background-color:#FFFFFF; border-top-style:hidden; border-bottom-style:hidden" |
! colspan="7" | [[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
! Year
! Host
! Round
! {{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! {{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
! {{Tooltip|D|Games drawn, including knockout matches decided on penalty kicks}}
! {{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
! {{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! {{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! Squad
! {{Tooltip|Pos.|Position in final qualification group stage}}
! {{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! {{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
! {{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
! {{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
! {{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! {{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1966 FIFA World Cup|1966]]
| colspan="9" | ''Part of the {{Flagdeco|United Kingdom}} United Kingdom''
| colspan="7" | ''Part of the {{Flagdeco|United Kingdom}} United Kingdom''
|-
! colspan="10" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Swaziland
! colspan="7" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Swaziland
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1970 FIFA World Cup|1970]] to [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
| colspan="9" | ''Not a FIFA member''
| colspan="7" | ''Not a FIFA member''
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]] to [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
| colspan="9" | ''Did not enter''
| colspan="7" | ''Did not enter''
|-
| [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
| align="left" | {{flag|United States}}
| colspan="9" rowspan="7" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[1994 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF first round#Group B|2nd]]
|3||1||1||1||1||5
|-
| [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
| align="left" | {{flag|France}}
| [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CAF)#First round|—]]
|2||0||0||2||0||3
|-
| [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Japan}}<br>{{flag|South Korea}}
| [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF first round|—]]
|2||0||0||2||1||8
|-
| [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Germany}}
| [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF first round|—]]
|2||0||1||1||1||4
|-
| [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF second round|3rd]]
|4||1||1||2||2||8
|-
| [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Brazil}}
| [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF first round|—]]
|2||0||0||2||2||8
|-
| [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Russia}}
| [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF second round|—]]
|4||2||1||1||8||3
|-
! colspan="10" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Eswatini
! colspan="7" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Eswatini
|-
| [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Qatar}}
| colspan="9" rowspan="2" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF first round|—]]
|2||0||1||1||1||2
|-
| [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Canada}}<br>{{flag|Mexico}}<br>{{flag|United States}}
| [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group D|6th]]
|10||0||3||7||6||19
|-
| [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Morocco}}<br>{{flag|Portugal}}<br>{{flag|Spain}}
| colspan="9" | ''To be determined''
| colspan="7" | ''To be determined''
|-
! colspan="2" | Total
! {{Tooltip|Never qualified|Highest finish}}
!0!!0!!0!!0!!0!!0
! —
! {{Tooltip|0/9|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!31!!4!!8!!19!!22!!60
|}

===Africa Cup of Nations===
{{Color box|gold|border=darkgray}} Winners&nbsp;&nbsp;{{Color box|silver|border=darkgray}} Runners-up&nbsp;&nbsp;{{Color box|#cc9966|border=darkgray}} Third place&nbsp;&nbsp;

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
! colspan="10" | [[Africa Cup of Nations]] record
! rowspan="31" style="background-color:#FFFFFF; border-top-style:hidden; border-bottom-style:hidden" |
! colspan="7" | Qualification record
|-
! Year
! Host
! Round
! {{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! {{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
! {{Tooltip|D|Games drawn, including knockout matches decided on penalty kicks}}
! {{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
! {{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! {{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! Squad
! {{Tooltip|Pos.|Position in final qualification group stage}}
! {{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! {{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
! {{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
! {{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
! {{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! {{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1957 African Cup of Nations|1957]] to [[1968 African Cup of Nations|1968]]
| colspan="9" | ''Part of the {{Flagdeco|United Kingdom}} United Kingdom''
| colspan="7" | ''Part of the {{Flagdeco|United Kingdom}} United Kingdom''
|-
! colspan="10" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Swaziland
! colspan="7" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Swaziland
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1970 African Cup of Nations|1970]] to [[1976 African Cup of Nations|1976]]
| colspan="9" | ''Not a CAF member''
| colspan="7" | ''Not a CAF member''
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1978 African Cup of Nations|1978]] to [[1982 African Cup of Nations|1982]]
| colspan="9" | ''Did not enter''
| colspan="7" | ''Did not enter''
|-
| [[1984 African Cup of Nations|1984]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Ivory Coast}}
| colspan="9" | ''Withdrew''
| colspan="7" | ''Withdrew''
|-
| [[1986 African Cup of Nations|1986]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Egypt}}
| colspan="9" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[1986 African Cup of Nations qualification#Preliminary round|—]]
|2||0||0||2||1||8
|-
| [[1988 African Cup of Nations|1988]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Morocco}}
| colspan="9" | ''Withdrew''
| colspan="7" | ''Withdrew''
|-
| [[1990 African Cup of Nations|1990]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Algeria}}
| colspan="9" rowspan="2" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[1990 African Cup of Nations qualification#First round|—]]
|4||0||3||1||3||5
|-
| [[1992 African Cup of Nations|1992]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Senegal|name=Senegal}}
| [[1992 African Cup of Nations qualification#Group 5|3rd]]
|5||1||2||2||4||9
|-
| [[1994 African Cup of Nations|1994]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Tunisia}}
| colspan="9" | ''Did not enter''
| colspan="7" | ''Did not enter''
|-
| [[1996 African Cup of Nations|1996]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| colspan="9" | ''Withdrew''
| colspan="7" | ''Withdrew''
|-
| [[1998 African Cup of Nations|1998]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Burkina Faso}}
| colspan="9" | ''Did not enter''
| colspan="7" | ''Did not enter''
|-
| [[2000 African Cup of Nations|2000]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Ghana}}<br>{{flag|Nigeria}}
| colspan="9" rowspan="7" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[2000 African Cup of Nations qualification#Preliminary round|—]]
|2||0||1||1||2||3
|-
| [[2002 African Cup of Nations|2002]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Mali}}
| [[2002 African Cup of Nations qualification#Preliminary round|—]]
|2||1||0||1||3||5
|-
| [[2004 African Cup of Nations|2004]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Tunisia}}
| [[2004 African Cup of Nations qualification#Group I|3rd]]
|6||2||2||2||8||12
|-
| [[2006 Africa Cup of Nations|2006]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Egypt}}
| [[2006 Africa Cup of Nations qualification#Qualifying round|—]]
|2||0||1||1||1||4
|-
| [[2008 Africa Cup of Nations|2008]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Ghana}}
| [[2008 Africa Cup of Nations qualification#Group 6|4th]]
|6||0||3||3||0||7
|-
| [[2010 Africa Cup of Nations|2010]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Angola}}
| [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF second round#Group 11|3rd]]
|4||1||1||2||2||8
|-
| [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations|2012]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Equatorial Guinea}}<br>{{flag|Guinea}}
| [[2012 Africa Cup of Nations qualification#Group I|4th]]
|6||0||0||6||2||14
|-
| [[2013 Africa Cup of Nations|2013]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| colspan="9" | ''Withdrew''
| colspan="7" | ''Withdrew''
|-
| [[2015 Africa Cup of Nations|2015]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Equatorial Guinea}}
| colspan="9" rowspan="2" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[2015 Africa Cup of Nations qualification#First round|—]]
|2||0||1||1||1||2
|-
| [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations|2017]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Gabon}}
| [[2017 Africa Cup of Nations qualification Group L|2nd]]
|6||2||2||2||5||5
|-
! colspan="10" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Eswatini
! colspan="7" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Eswatini
|-
| [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations|2019]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Egypt}}
| colspan="9" rowspan="4" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations qualification Group J|4th]]
|6||0||1||5||2||14
|-
| [[2021 Africa Cup of Nations|2021]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Cameroon}}
| [[2021 Africa Cup of Nations qualification Group I|4th]]
|6||0||2||4||3||13
|-
| [[2023 Africa Cup of Nations|2023]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Ivory Coast}}
| [[2023 Africa Cup of Nations qualification Group B|4th]]
|8||2||3||3||8||9
|-
| [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Morocco}}
| [[2025 Africa Cup of Nations qualification Group I|4th]]
|8||1||3||4||7||15
|-
| [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations|2027]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Kenya}}<br>{{flag|Tanzania}}<br>{{flag|Uganda}}
| colspan="9" | ''To be determined''
| colspan="7" | ''To be determined''
|-
! colspan="2" | Total
! {{Tooltip|Never qualified|Highest finish}}
!0!!0!!0!!0!!0!!0
! —
! {{Tooltip|0/16|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!75!!10!!25!!40!!52!!133
|}

===COSAFA Cup===
{{Color box|gold|border=darkgray}} Winners&nbsp;&nbsp;{{Color box|silver|border=darkgray}} Runners-up&nbsp;&nbsp;{{Color box|#cc9966|border=darkgray}} Third place&nbsp;&nbsp;

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
! colspan="10" | [[COSAFA Cup]] record
! rowspan="29" style="background-color:#FFFFFF; border-top-style:hidden; border-bottom-style:hidden" |
! colspan="7" | Qualification record
|-
! Year
! Host
! Round
! {{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! {{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
! {{Tooltip|D|Games drawn, including knockout matches decided on penalty kicks}}
! {{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
! {{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! {{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! Squad
! {{Tooltip|Pos.|Position in final qualification group stage}}
! {{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! {{Tooltip|W|Games won}}
! {{Tooltip|D|Games drawn}}
! {{Tooltip|L|Games lost}}
! {{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! {{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
! colspan="10" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Swaziland
! colspan="7" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Swaziland
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]]
| colspan="9" rowspan="2" | ''Did not qualify''
| [[1997 COSAFA Cup#Qualifying round|—]]
|1||0||0||1||0||4
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1998 COSAFA Cup|1998]]
| [[1998 COSAFA Cup#Qualifying round|—]]
|1||0||0||1||0||1
|-
| colspan="2" | [[1999 COSAFA Cup|1999]]
| Semi-finals
|2||0||2||0||2||2
| [[1999 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
| [[1999 COSAFA Cup#Qualifying round|—]]
|1||1||0||0||3||1
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2000 COSAFA Cup|2000]]
| Quarter-finals
|1||0||0||1||0||2
| [[2000 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
| colspan="7" rowspan="15" | ''No qualification''
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2001 COSAFA Cup|2001]]
| Quarter-finals
|2||0||1||1||1||2
| [[2001 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2002 COSAFA Cup|2002]]
| Semi-finals
|3||2||0||1||5||5
| [[2002 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2003 COSAFA Cup|2003]]
| Quarter-finals
|2||1||0||1||2||2
| [[2003 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2004 COSAFA Cup|2004]]
| Quarter-finals
|1||0||0||1||0||5
| [[2004 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2005 COSAFA Cup|2005]]
| Group stage
|1||0||0||1||0||3
| [[2005 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2006 COSAFA Cup|2006]]
| Group stage
|2||1||0||1||2||1
| [[2006 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| colspan="2" | [[2007 COSAFA Cup|2007]]
| Group stage
|2||1||1||0||1||0
| [[2007 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2008 COSAFA Cup|2008]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Group stage
|3||1||2||0||3||2
| [[2008 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2009 COSAFA Cup|2009]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Zimbabwe}}
| Group stage
|3||2||0||1||5||2
| [[2009 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2013 COSAFA Cup|2013]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Zambia}}
| Group stage
|3||0||1||2||0||4
| [[2013 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2015 COSAFA Cup|2015]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Group stage
|3||2||1||0||4||1
| [[2015 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2016 COSAFA Cup|2016]]
| align="left" | {{flag|Namibia}}
| style="background:#cc9966" | Third place
|6||3||2||1||9||7
| [[2016 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2017 COSAFA Cup|2017]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Semi-finals
|2||1||0||1||2||2
| [[2017 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
| [[2018 COSAFA Cup|2018]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Quarter-finals
|2||0||0||2||0||3
| [[2018 COSAFA Cup squads#Swaziland|Squad]]
|-
! colspan="10" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Eswatini
! colspan="7" | as {{Flagdeco|Eswatini}} Eswatini
|-
| [[2019 COSAFA Cup|2019]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Group stage
|2||0||2||0||4||4
| [[2019 COSAFA Cup squads#Eswatini|Squad]]
| colspan="7" rowspan="6" | ''No qualification''
|-
| [[2021 COSAFA Cup|2021]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| style="background:#cc9966" | Third place
|6||2||3||1||8||6
| [[2021 COSAFA Cup squads#Eswatini|Squad]]
|-
| [[2022 COSAFA Cup|2022]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Quarter-finals
|5||2||2||1||7||4
| [[2022 COSAFA Cup squads#Eswatini|Squad]]
|-
| [[2023 COSAFA Cup|2023]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Group stage
|3||1||0||2||3||4
| [[2023 COSAFA Cup squads#Eswatini|Squad]]
|-
| [[2024 COSAFA Cup|2024]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Group stage
|3||0||2||1||0||1
| [[2024 COSAFA Cup squads#Eswatini|Squad]]
|-
| [[2025 COSAFA Cup|2025]]
| align="left" | {{flag|South Africa}}
| Group stage
|2||0||1||1||2||3
| [[2025 COSAFA Cup squads#Eswatini|Squad]]
|-
! colspan="2" | Total
! {{Tooltip|Third place|Highest finish}}
!59!!19!!20!!20!!60!!65
! —
! {{Tooltip|1/3|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!3!!1!!0!!2!!3!!6
|}

==Honours==
===Regional===
* '''[[COSAFA Cup]]'''
** {{Bronze3}} Third place (2): 2016, 2021

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* [https://www.cafonline.com/member-associations/swz/ Eswatini] at [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/SWZ Eswatini] at [[FIFA]]

{{Football in Swaziland}}
{{CAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Eswatini}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Eswatini National Football Team}}
[[Category:Eswatini national football team| ]]
[[Category:African national association football teams]]
